text:
Ai (アイ, Ai), a "Gaseous Lifeform" (, Gasu Seimeitai), is a mysterious being and one of the Five Threats that humanity met in the Dark Continent. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 341 It lives south-southwest of Lake Mobius, but some of its victims have also been found in the known world. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 344 

Appearance

Little is known of Ai's appearance, but it seems to be a gaseous life form with limb-like appendages extending from its main form. 

History

When the Mimbo Republic, after enlisting the help of the Hunter Association, sent an expedition to the Dark Continent searching for the Trinity Elixir, they were surrounded by Ai. After a still-unknown dispute or struggle ensued, only three survivors returned, empty-handed and without even a shred of sanity. While it was said to have been locked up after being brought back from the Dark Continent, there have been victims of Ai found within the known world. 

Abilities & Powers

Not much is stated about Ai's abilities, but it can kill humans, as it has made victims in the known world. According to the "Dangerous Creatures Evaluation List" Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Extras utilized by the Hunter Association, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 346 Ai merits a threat level of A, which is even higher than that of the Chimera Ants at B. 

Trivia

"Ai" is the Japanese word for "love."
Its name seems to derive from the sound it makes.
Its full title reads "Codependence of Desire... A Gaseous Life-Form: Ai", codependency is a type of dysfunctional relationship where one person supports or encourages the self-destructive behavior of another individual.
The deaths caused by Ai in the known world may be the work of Nanika through Alluka Zoldyck, as she was revealed to have originated in the Dark Continent, and she shares many similarities with Ai:
Nanika's victims are either squashed Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 322 or wrung to death Hunter × Hunter - Volume 31, Chapter 323 if her requests are refused; some of the ascertained victims of the Five Threats were killed exactly that way. It was also stated that, although their manner of death was described in Journey to the New World, those bodies were all found in the known world rather than in the Dark Continent, and that the massacre is ongoing. Ging Freecss has also revealed that victims of Ai and Pap have been found in the known world. 
Nanika has a peculiar way of saying "yes" in the original: instead of "hai" (はい), she pronounces it "ai" (あい). When written in katakana (アイ), this is the name of one of the Five Threats, Ai, and its distinctive call (in hiragana again). 
Nanika has the same deep black eyes as Ai. Furthermore, in the extras, Alluka's skin, while possessed, is colored black with the same technique used to draw Ai. 
Nanika's possession of Alluka, her wish to please others, and her devotion to Killua could be related to Ai's description as "Codependence of Desire".
